extension.description: Alpha testing repository for The Crew addons. Contains pre-release versions with latest features and fixes. For testing purposes only.[CR][CR]Version 2.2.8-alpha / 2.3.7-alpha includes:[CR]• New Kids Section with family-friendly content filtering (G/PG movies, TV-Y/TV-G shows)[CR]• TMDB Discover API integration for curated children's content[CR]• Fixed critical service startup bug - version announcements now working[CR]• Service.py main() now executes properly on Kodi startup[CR]• Startup maintenance and provider updates restored[CR]• Improved Trakt sync scheduling with user-configurable intervals
extension.disclaimer: This repository contains ALPHA software. Use at your own risk. Backup your Kodi databases before installing.
extension.news: v1.0.8 (Mar 2026) - Kids section added, critical service.py startup fix, updated descriptions[CR]v1.0.7 (Mar 2026) - Repository package optimization, development files excluded[CR]v1.0.5 (Feb 2026) - Removed unhingedthemes repository[CR]v1.0.4 (Feb 2026) - Removed production repository from alpha site
